common.name: Name
common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
common.deleteError: Couldn't delete. Please try again in a moment.

hero.title: Take back control of your budget
hero.subtitle: Track your income and spending without stress. The 50/30/20 rule automatically guides you toward calm, lasting money management.
hero.trustIntro: Join those who found financial peace of mind

heroSimple.title: Peace in your budget
heroSimple.subtitle: Track your income and spending, split automatically with the 50/30/20 rule, and move calmly toward your goals.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A suite of simple, powerful tools, designed for mental clarity.

items.title: 3-step onboarding
items.description: Enter your income and the 50/30/20 envelopes are calculated automatically. Zero configuration.

items.title: Quick expense entry
items.description: Log an expense in under 10 seconds. Focus, amount, category, done.

items.title: Visual budget tracking
items.description: Calm progress bars that show where you stand, without guilt.

items.title: Custom budgets
items.description: Create goals (holidays, emergency fund) and track them in real time.

items.title: Monthly navigation
items.description: Explore your past months' spending. Full history, always accessible.

items.title: Light/dark theme
items.description: The app adapts to your preference. Read comfortably anytime.

benefits.title: The 50/30/20 rule explained
benefits.subtitle: A simple, proven framework for a balanced financial life.

items.title: 50% — Essentials
items.desc: Housing, food, transport, health. The foundation that doesn't change.

items.title: 30% — Leisure
items.desc: Restaurants, outings, holidays, culture. Joy and experiences.

items.title: 20% — Savings
items.desc: Emergency fund, investments, long-term projects. Your future.

benefits.list1: It's easy to remember and set up — no complex math.
benefits.list2: It balances pleasure and safety — you don't deprive yourself, you invest.
benefits.list3: It adapts to any income — what matters is the proportion, not the absolute figure.

onboarding.welcomeBody: kōza splits your income with the 50 / 30 / 20 rule: half for essentials, 30% for leisure, 20% for savings. A clear budget, no pressure.
onboarding.setupBody: Add your main income source. You can add others or skip this step.
onboarding.confirmBody: From {amount} of income, here's your 50 / 30 / 20 split.
onboarding.confirmBodyEmpty: You can add your income whenever you like. Here's how kōza will split it.

dashboard.noIncomeBanner: Add your income to see your 50/30/20 goals.
dashboard.carryNegative: Carryover from last month: {amount} to absorb

incomes.summaryEmpty: Add your income sources to see your envelopes.
incomes.empty: No income for this month. Add your first source to see your envelopes.
incomes.deleteMessage: “{source}” will be removed from this month.

expenses.empty: No expenses this month. Add your first expense.
expenses.deleteMessage: “{description}” will be removed from this month.

budgets.empty: No budgets yet. Create your first goal.
budgets.deleteMessage: “{name}” will be deleted. Linked expenses will be unlinked, not deleted.

recurring.pageSubtitle: Your charges that come back every month, quarter or year.
recurring.empty: No recurring expenses. Add your fixed or variable charges.
recurring.deleteMessage: “{label}” will no longer generate expenses. Past expenses are kept.
recurring.pendingBanner: Some variable recurring expenses need confirming.
